description_long: This object is a rectangular, matte black electronic device with a minimalist design, featuring a perforated section on one side for ventilation. The front face displays a small, circular Xbox logo, indicating it is a Microsoft Xbox One gaming console. The top surface is smooth except for the vented area, which likely aids in cooling internal components. The device is composed of two stacked layers, with a subtle seam running horizontally around the body. The overall appearance is sleek and modern, with no visible buttons or ports on the main visible faces. Its compact, boxy form is designed to sit horizontally on a flat surface, such as a shelf or entertainment center.
description: A matte black, rectangular Xbox One gaming console with a vented section and a small Xbox logo on the front. The design is sleek, modern, and minimalist.
description_view_0: The left side of the console, showing a smooth surface with a visible seam and the vented section on the right.
description_view_1: The rear or side view, dominated by the perforated vent area, with no visible logos or controls.
description_view_2: The front view, featuring the Xbox logo on the right and a clear view of the seam and vented section.
description_view_3: The opposite side to view 1, showing a smooth, unadorned surface with the vented section on the left.
